ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose your preferred date format for inserting new dates
ast.target: 选择您插入新日期时首选的日期格式

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use the selected date format when modifying existing dates
ast.target: 修改现有日期时使用所选的日期格式

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Insert time in 24 hour format when performing "Insert new time" and "Insert new date and time" commands
ast.target: 执行“插入新时间”和“插入新日期和时间”命令时，以24小时格式插入时间

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shows a button with a calendar icon associated with date values, select it to open the picker (Reloading Obsidian may be required)
ast.target: 显示一个与日期值关联的日历图标按钮，点击它可打开选择器（可能需要重新加载Obsidian）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shows a button with a clock icon associated with time values, select it to open the picker (Reloading Obsidian may be required)
ast.target: 显示一个与时间值关联的时钟图标按钮，点击它可打开选择器（可能需要重新加载Obsidian）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, the datepicker will ignore dates inside markdown codeblocks (both inline code and fenced code blocks, Reloading Obsidian may be required)
ast.target: 启用后，日期选择器将忽略Markdown代码块内的日期（包括行内代码和围栏代码块，可能需要重新加载Obsidian）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Datepicker will show automatically whenever a date/time value is selected
ast.target: 每当选择日期/时间值时，日期选择器将自动显示

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Will automatically apply edits made to the date when the datepicker closes or loses focus
ast.target: 当日期选择器关闭或失去焦点时，将自动应用对日期所做的编辑

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Immediately show the calendar when the datepicker opens
ast.target: 日期选择器打开时立即显示日历

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically focus the datepicker whenever the datepicker opens
ast.target: 日期选择器打开时自动聚焦

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Focuses the datepicker when the down arrow keyboard key is pressed
ast.target: 按下向下箭头键时聚焦日期选择器

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically select the entire date/time text when a date/time is selected
ast.target: 选择日期/时间时自动选择整个日期/时间文本
